info.english_meaning: to sound to howl to hum to yelp to roar to cry out loud

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'nanu sahacarIM dUre matvA virOzi samutsukaH' (vikrama0 420) virOzi vASyase kUjasi krandasi
'na sa virOti na cApi sa SoBate' (paYcata0 175) virOti SiNkte kvaRati raRati
'ete ta eva girayo viruvanmayUrAH' (uttara0 223) viruvanto virAvaM kurvantaH kUjanto mayUrA yatra te
'gAyanESca virAviRyo vAdanESca taTA parEH' (rA0 11819) virAviRyaH (raTyAH) pratiSrutvatyaH pratiDvanitAH
'o rodasI vfzaBo roravIti' (f0 6731) dyAvApfTivyO ramBayA pUrayan ityAha
'ArAvaM mAtfvargasya BfgURAM kzatriyErvaDe' (BA0 Adi0 1805) ArAvaH kranditaM krandanaDvaniH
'vfzeva yUTe sahasA vidAno gavyannaBi ruva saMDanAjit' (aTarva0 5203) aBiruva=aBito narda
'ekarute na SuBaM yadi vA syAdekarute pratirOti cireRa' (va0 bf0 saM0 8837) pratirOti pratiravaM karoti
'anyapratirutA yAmyA sodbanDamftaSaMsinI' (va0 bf0 saM0 907) anyayA SivayA kftaM ravamanukftya kftaravA
